comments.body: looks like you bumped to 1.22-dev?  Can you change the commit message then please?
There are two commits in this PR, https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/358/commits/0b7315460126b8945fd53f9318a65d7cc8796af1 this is the one for the release and has correct commit message
Thanks for the 411 @runcom, I didn't catch the two commits, I thought the second had replaced the first.
